hero_subtitle: SFTY structures alerts, cases and supervisory actions into a connected evidence trail to enhance risk-based oversight and support audit-ready digital asset supervision.
trust_card_1_value: Market participants, licensing data and risk profiles
trust_card_2_value: Wallets, transactions and exposure across the market
trust_card_3_value: Originator and beneficiary data checked for completeness
trust_card_5_value: On-premise or private cloud for sensitive data
trust_card_6_value: Supervisory outputs, evidence and regulatory reports
problem_title: Supervisory action falters without connected evidence
problem_description: Regulators struggle to link alerts, cases and market activity when evidence remains isolated across systems. This fragmentation slows escalation workflows and weakens the ability to deliver accountable supervisory outcomes.
problem_point_1_value: VASP activity, licensing data and risk signals remain scattered
problem_point_2_value: Alerts and investigations depend on disconnected manual processes
problem_point_3_value: Decisions are harder to explain without connected logs and case history
problem_point_4_value: Regulatory teams lack one shared operating layer for supervision
solution_description: SFTY connects alerts, cases, entity data and transaction activity into a unified evidence layer that supports regulators in managing escalation workflows with traceability and audit-grade documentation.
workflow_title: From market signal to supervisory action
workflow_description: SFTY structures market signals into supervisory alerts that escalate into cases, investigations, actions and evidence for regulatory review and reporting workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: Wallet, VASP, Travel Rule or OSINT signal appears
workflow_step_2_description: SFTY classifies and routes the signal for review
workflow_step_3_description: A supervisory case opens with context & evidence
workflow_step_4_description: Teams record a decision, request or supervisory response
workflow_step_5_description: Evidence, actions and outcomes stay available for review
why_sfty_title: Not another analytics tool. Supervisory evidence layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented alerts, cases and evidence into structured supervisory workflows, enabling regulators to manage escalation and reporting with audit-grade clarity and control.
why_sfty_card_1_description: See activity across VASPs, wallets, entities and risk signals
why_sfty_card_2_description: Connect participants, structures, links and supervisory records
why_sfty_card_3_description: Move from alerts to investigations, actions and reporting
why_sfty_card_4_description: Understand not only single risks, but the condition of the market
authority_description: SFTY delivers a secure, auditable platform for regulators requiring controlled deployment, evidence-grade logging, role-based governance and procurement-ready integration from day one.
authority_card_1_description: Deploy on-premise, in private cloud or inside a controlled government environment
authority_card_2_description: Preserve activity, decisions, case history and reporting evidence
authority_card_3_description: Control who can view, review, escalate and act across teams and agencies
authority_card_4_description: Support phased implementation, documentation, integrations and governance review
ask_sfty_placeholder: Ask SFTY how supervisory evidence links cases and alerts
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how alerts convert into evidence-based supervisory cases
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-grade logging preserves regulatory decision history
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe secure escalation workflows for risk-based supervision
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for supervisory, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on VASP supervision, sovereign deployment, evidence logging and regulatory workflows.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for digital asset regulators?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides regulators with a connected supervisory layer connecting VASP and CASP data, cases, evidence, and reports for structured, risk-based market oversight and operational supervision.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage supervisory escalation?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes alerts into cases with linked evidence, supports assignment, review notes, escalation steps and decision logs to guide supervisory actions within a structured workflow.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision records and supporting evidence in audit-ready logs, enabling review readiness and defensible supervisory documentation.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate multiple provider outputs?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects outputs from KYT, KYC, KYB, Travel Rule and blockchain analytics providers into one normalized supervisory environment without replacing them.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing supervisory tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY operates above existing tools, orchestrating provider data into structured supervisory workflows without replacing underlying analytics or regulatory systems.
final_title: Structure supervisory evidence and escalation workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY connects alerts, cases and supervisory actions into one audit-ready digital asset oversight layer.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
